name: Recast
description: Bayesian marketing mix modeling platform for rigorous, statistically sound marketing performance insights.

seo.title: Recast — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Recast: Bayesian marketing mix modeling platform for rigorous, statistically sound marketing performance insights.

when_to_use: Bayesian MMM for statistically sound media attribution
Marketing budget allocation using causal inference modeling
Cross-channel performance insights without last-touch bias

pros: Fully Bayesian MMM with uncertainty quantified
Strong fit for data-literate growth teams
cons: Requires clean, historical data to shine
Not real-time — decisions come on a weekly cadence
Not an MMP or install tracker
review.verdict: Gold-standard modern MMM for analytically serious teams, but sits above, not inside, your MMP stack.
review.best_for: Data-mature marketing teams wanting rigorous Bayesian MMM with proper uncertainty intervals.
review.not_for: Small, fast-moving teams that need deterministic daily attribution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
